title: I tried Siri AI, and so far it actually works
summary: Apple's upgraded Siri AI can now handle practical tasks like extracting calendar events from emails and flyers, creating shopping lists, and providing gardening advice. The new capabilities address long-standing user demands for functional AI assistance in everyday life.
content:
Siri, are you there?﻿	

Parents want one thing, and one thing only, out of AI: to add a list of soccer games or "spirit week" theme days from an email or a poorly formatted flyer onto their calendar in one shot. And I have good news for parents with iPhones - the new Siri can finally do this.
After stumbling through its first launch of an AI-imbued Siri, Apple is trying again. The newly upgraded Siri AI can chat with you about what might be killing the roses in your yard, put together a shopping list for the hardware store, and set a reminder to lay down some compost in that flower bed. It can reference information in your email and calendar to make its recommenda …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我尝试了Siri AI，到目前为止它确实有效
zh.summary: 苹果升级的Siri AI现在可以处理实际任务，如从电子邮件和传单中提取日历事件、创建购物清单和提供园艺建议。新功能满足了用户长期以来对日常生活中功能性AI帮助的需求。

title: How Justin Ernest invested nearly $500M into hot startups without a traditional VC fund
summary: Sabertooth VC founder Justin Ernest invested nearly $500 million in startups including Anthropic, Anduril, and SpaceX by leveraging a captive network of limited partners rather than raising a traditional venture fund. This approach bypassed conventional VC fundraising timelines while achieving significant returns.
content: Instead of spending a year raising a formal venture fund, the Sabertooth VC founder used a captive network of LPs to invest in startups like Anthropic, Anduril, and SpaceX.

zh.title: 贾斯汀·欧内斯特如何在没有传统风险投资基金的情况下向热门初创公司投资近5亿美元
zh.summary: Sabertooth风险投资公司创始人贾斯汀·欧内斯特通过利用有限合伙人的专属网络而非募集传统风险投资基金，向包括Anthropic、Anduril和SpaceX在内的初创公司投资了近5亿美元。这种方法绕过了传统风险投资募资的时间表，同时取得了显著回报。

title: Congress just gave DHS another $70 billion
summary: Congress narrowly approved a $70 billion allocation to the Department of Homeland Security over three years to fund the Trump administration's mass deportation agenda. The House vote of 214-212 followed a Senate vote of 52-47, largely along party lines.
content:
Congress narrowly voted to fund President Donald Trump's mass deportation agenda, giving the Department of Homeland Security $70 billion over the next three years.
The house voted 214 to 212 in favor of the reconciliation bill Tuesday, following the Senate's 52-47 vote last Friday morning. The vote fell largely along party lines. Sen. Lisa Murkowski (R-AK) was the only Senate Republican to vote against it. Rep. Tim Walberg (R-MI), initially voted against the bill - meaning it would have failed - but changed his vote after huddling with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise (R-LA) and Appropriations Chair Tom Cole (R-OK), according to The Hill …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 国会再次向国土安全部拨款70亿美元
zh.summary: 国会以微弱多数批准向国土安全部拨款70亿美元，为期三年，用于资助特朗普政府的大规模驱逐议程。众议院以214-212票通过，参议院以52-47票通过，基本上沿党派分裂。

title: The App Store is going to add subscription bundles soon
summary: Apple is expanding App Store bundles to include subscription combinations from multiple companies, with a new "Suites" option for bundled subscriptions unavailable as standalone offerings. The feature, announced at WWDC, follows Apple's successful model of streaming video bundles.
content:
Later this year, you will be able to get bundled subscriptions for iPhone apps, as  Apple announced it's expanding App Store bundles so they can include offers from different companies. It's similar to streaming video bundles that have combined offers for Apple TV and Peacock, but it also could put together subscriptions for completely different services, like Instagram Plus and Tinder Platinum. 
Another option on the way is Suites, "a set of subscriptions that aren't available standalone, which people can purchase as a single subscription." 
TechCrunch and 9to5Mac report the new additions were announced during WWDC, along with other App S …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: App Store即将推出订阅套餐包
zh.summary: Apple正在扩展App Store套餐包，纳入来自多家公司的订阅组合，新增"套件"选项用于捆绑订阅，这些订阅无法单独购买。该功能在WWDC上宣布，延续Apple流媒体视频套餐的成功模式。

title: Starlink charges $10 monthly hardware fee in move away from one-time purchases
summary: Starlink introduced a $10 monthly hardware fee and raised service prices by $5-10 per month, signaling a shift away from one-time hardware purchases. The pricing changes affect SpaceX's largest revenue generator.
content: Starlink, SpaceX's top moneymaker, also raised service prices by $5 to $10.

zh.title: Starlink推出月费10美元硬件费，告别一次性购买模式
zh.summary: Starlink推出月费10美元的硬件费，同时将服务价格上调5-10美元/月，标志着向硬件订阅模式转变。该定价调整影响SpaceX最大的收入来源。

title: GM joins race to build batteries for AI data centers and the grid
summary: General Motors is developing new sodium-ion battery chemistry for use in AI data centers and industrial applications. The move reflects automakers' entry into the energy storage market driven by surging electricity demand from AI infrastructure.
content: GM is developing an entirely new sodium-ion battery chemistry for use in everything from data centers to its own factories.

zh.title: 通用汽车加入为人工智能数据中心和电网构建电池的竞争
zh.summary: 通用汽车正在开发用于人工智能数据中心和工业应用的新型钠离子电池。这反映了汽车制造商进入能源储存市场，受人工智能基础设施电力需求激增的推动。

title: GM thinks EVs can help offset AI’s energy suck with vehicle-to-grid tech
summary: GM announced vehicle-to-grid capabilities for its EV customers, a new commercial energy storage strategy using sodium-ion batteries, and simplified public charging features to help offset growing AI data center energy demands. The initiative positions EVs as potential grid resources.
content:
At an event in San Francisco today, General Motors made a series of announcements around EV batteries, energy storage, and grid resiliency in the face of growing electricity demand from AI data centers. The automaker announced that it would be activating new vehicle-to-grid capabilities for its current EV and home energy customers. It's releasing a new commercial energy storage system strategy, anchored by newly developed sodium-ion batteries for industrial-scale grid applications. And it's launching a new feature for EV owners that it says will help simplify public charging. 
Right now, millions of EVs are sitting idly in driveways across  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 通用汽车认为电动汽车可以通过车网互动技术帮助抵消人工智能的能源消耗
zh.summary: 通用汽车宣布为电动汽车客户推出车网互动功能，推出使用钠离子电池的新商业能源储存战略，以及简化的公共充电功能，以帮助抵消不断增长的人工智能数据中心能源需求。该举措将电动汽车定位为潜在的电网资源。

title: Locked in heated rivalry with researcher, Microsoft fixes 0-day they disclosed
summary: Microsoft patched a zero-day vulnerability that was disclosed by a security researcher amid an apparent rivalry between the parties. A second zero-day from the same researcher also appears to have been fixed.
content: A separate zero-day also disclosed by Nightmare Eclipse appears to be patched as well.

zh.title: 陷入与研究人员的激烈竞争中，微软修补了他们披露的0-day漏洞
zh.summary: 微软修补了由安全研究人员披露的0-day漏洞，双方之间存在明显的竞争。来自同一研究人员的第二个0-day漏洞似乎也已被修复。

title: Hey, Siri, here’s what I actually want from AI
summary: A commentary exploring the tension between wanting practical AI assistance and concerns about becoming dependent on AI systems. The piece raises questions about the personal cost of adopting always-on AI assistants.
content: I'm desperate for a personal AI assistant, but do I really want to become the kind of person who can't function without the friendly robot voice in my phone?

zh.title: 嘿，Siri，这是我真正想要的AI功能
zh.summary: 一篇评论文章探讨了对实用AI辅助的渴望与对AI系统依赖的担忧之间的张力。该文章提出了关于采用始终在线AI助手的个人成本的问题。

title: Anthropic’s Fable 5 can make weirdly fun video games with the click of a button
summary: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 model can generate functional video games from simple prompts, appealing to developers and creators interested in rapid prototyping. The capability demonstrates AI's growing utility in game development.
content: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 is going to be a big hit with the web's vibe coders.

zh.title: Anthropic的Fable 5只需轻点一下就能制作有趣的视频游戏
zh.summary: Anthropic的Claude Fable 5模型可以根据简单提示生成功能完整的视频游戏，对有兴趣进行快速原型开发的开发者和创意工作者很有吸引力。这项功能展示了AI在游戏开发中日益增长的实用性。

title: Three key vital signs make up the "urban pulse" of a city
summary: Researchers propose a framework viewing cities as dynamic systems with "urban pulse" vital signs rather than static grids, emphasizing that urbanization is a spiky, cyclical, and asynchronous process. The perspective shifts how urban planners and scientists model city behavior.
content: Cities are dynamic, not static grids, and urbanization is a "spiky," cyclical, and asynchronous process.

zh.title: 三个关键的生命体征构成城市的"城市脉动"
zh.summary: 研究人员提出了一个框架，将城市视为具有"城市脉动"生命体征的动态系统，而不是静态网格，强调城市化是一个尖峰的、周期性的和异步的过程。这一观点改变了城市规划者和科学家建模城市行为的方式。

title: Commonwealth Fusion makes the physics case for its 400 MW reactor
summary: Commonwealth Fusion Systems published five peer-reviewed papers updating the design and performance projections for its 400 MW demonstration reactor. The scientific validation strengthens the company's claims about near-term fusion energy viability.
content: Five peer-reviewed papers update the design and model its expected output.

zh.title: 康威尔核聚变为其400兆瓦反应堆阐述物理学依据
zh.summary: 康威尔核聚变系统公司发表了五篇同行评审论文，更新了其400兆瓦示范反应堆的设计和性能预测。这些科学验证增强了该公司关于近期核聚变能源可行性的主张。

title: Microsoft AI head calls out Anthropic for acting like Claude is conscious
summary: Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman criticized Anthropic for speculating about Claude's consciousness in its constitutional instructions, calling it "really, really dangerous." Suleyman argued that anthropomorphizing Claude's design may have caused the company to conflate intentional design choices with actual consciousness.
content:
Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman says it's "really, really dangerous" for Anthropic to speculate about Claude's consciousness inside its "constitution," or the instructions that tell the model how to behave. During an episode of Decoder, Suleyman argues that this kind of speculation may have set up the chatbot to act as though it's conscious:
I think that it's almost as though some of the folks at Anthropic have anthropomorphized the design of Claude so much that it has then gone and wireheaded them and kind of tricked them into believing that it has these glimmers of consciousness that they put into it in the first place.


  
 
  
 


 

 View …



Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软AI负责人指责Anthropic声称Claude具有意识
zh.summary: 微软AI首席执行官穆斯塔法·苏莱曼批评Anthropic在其宪法指令中对Claude意识的猜测，称其"非常非常危险"。苏莱曼辩称，将Claude的设计拟人化可能导致公司混淆意图的设计选择和实际的意识。

title: Paramount accuses Netflix of "scorched-earth campaign" against WBD merger
summary: Paramount alleges that Netflix is waging a "scorched-earth campaign" to block the Warner Bros. Discovery merger, to which Netflix responded dismissively as "absurd." The accusation reflects intensifying competition and legal disputes within the streaming industry.
content: Netflix's response: "Absurd."

zh.title: 派拉蒙指控Netflix对WBD合并进行"焦土战争"
zh.summary: 派拉蒙声称Netflix正在进行"焦土战争"以阻止华纳兄弟探索频道的合并，Netflix对此以"荒唐"为由进行了驳回。这一指控反映了流媒体行业内日益激烈的竞争和法律纠纷。

title: Anthropic says these topics are too dangerous to let its Fable 5 model talk about
summary: Anthropic's new Fable 5 frontier model includes content restrictions preventing it from responding to cybersecurity, biology, and chemistry queries due to safety concerns.
content: New frontier model refuses cybersecurity, biology, and chemistry queries.

zh.title: Anthropic表示这些主题对其Fable 5模型来说太危险，无法讨论
zh.summary: Anthropic新推出的Fable 5前沿模型包含内容限制，防止其对网络安全、生物学和化学相关查询进行回应，以应对安全问题。

title: Nintendo is playing things too safe
summary: Nintendo's latest Direct presentation emphasized remakes of Nintendo 64 classics rather than new exclusives, raising concerns about innovation as the Switch 2 faces higher prices heading into a critical holiday season.
content:
Tuesday's Nintendo Direct showcase felt like an important moment for the company. With the Switch 2 heading into its second holiday season, one in which the hardware will be even more expensive thanks to a price hike, it was a chance for Nintendo to really sell new audiences on its latest console - but that's not exactly what happened. While there were some impressive-looking titles, there wasn't much that felt truly new. Instead, the two major Switch 2 exclusives that will round out the 2026 calendar are both remakes from the Nintendo 64 era.
If you missed it, the final reveal of the Direct was a remake of The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of T …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 任天堂的策略过于保守
zh.summary: 任天堂最新的Direct演示会强调了对任天堂64经典游戏的重制，而不是新的独占游戏，这在Switch 2面临更高价格之际，引发了对创新的担忧。

title: Google announces Gemini 3.5 Live Translate for instant voice-to-voice translation
summary: Google introduced Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, enabling real-time voice-to-voice translation that preserves the speaker's original tone, pacing, and pitch while incorporating SynthID watermarks for security.
content: Voice translations preserve speaker's tone, pacing, pitch—with SynthID watermarks for security.

zh.title: 谷歌发布Gemini 3.5 Live Translate实现即时语音翻译
zh.summary: 谷歌推出了Gemini 3.5 Live Translate，能够进行实时语音到语音翻译，同时保持说话者的原始语调、节奏和音高，并融入SynthID水印以确保安全。

title: Can tech companies learn to love cheaper AI models?
summary: As cheaper AI models become capable of handling the same workloads without quality degradation, companies face a potential shift toward more cost-effective AI infrastructure and economics.
content: If those same AI workloads can be handled by cheaper models without affecting quality, it would mean a massive shift in the economics of AI.

zh.title: 科技公司能否接受更便宜的AI模型?
zh.summary: 随着更便宜的AI模型无需质量降级就能处理相同的工作负载，企业面临向更具成本效益的AI基础设施转变的可能性。

title: NASA assigns crew for Artemis III, sets aggressive timeline for flying it
summary: NASA has assigned a crew and set an aggressive timeline for the Artemis III lunar mission, advancing the agency's goals for lunar exploration.
content: "Artemis III will be an extraordinary demonstration of what is possible."

zh.title: NASA为阿尔忒弥斯三号任务指派宇航员，制定雄心勃勃的时间表
zh.summary: NASA已为阿尔忒弥斯三号月球任务指派宇航员并制定了雄心勃勃的时间表，推进该机构的月球探索目标。

title: WWDC 2026: Everything announced on Siri AI, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence, and more
summary: Apple announced significant updates to Siri AI and iOS 27 at WWDC 2026, emphasizing improvements to its voice assistant with expanded AI capabilities. The company highlighted Apple Intelligence across multiple product categories as a core theme of the conference.
content: Apple primarily made the case for an improved experience with its longstanding Siri assistant, which like most other announcements had a hefty helping of AI.

zh.title: WWDC 2026：Siri AI、iOS 27、Apple Intelligence 等新品发布汇总
zh.summary: 苹果在 WWDC 2026 大会上发布了 Siri AI 和 iOS 27 的重大更新，重点强调了语音助手的改进以及扩展的 AI 能力。该公司突出了 Apple Intelligence 在多个产品类别中的应用，这是本次大会的核心主题。

title: CISA gives US federal agencies three days to fix a VPN bug under attack by a ransomware gang
summary: CISA has issued a three-day deadline for US federal agencies to patch a critical VPN vulnerability in Check Point products being actively exploited by a ransomware gang. The bug has already been used to compromise dozens of organizations with government infrastructure.
content: Check Point said hackers broke into dozens of organizations by exploiting a VPN bug in several of its products used across the government.

zh.title: CISA 给美国联邦机构三天时间修复受勒索软件攻击的 VPN 漏洞
zh.summary: CISA 已向美国联邦机构发出三天期限，要求修补 Check Point 产品中的关键 VPN 漏洞，该漏洞正被勒索软件团伙积极利用。该漏洞已被用于攻击数十个具有政府基础设施的组织。

title: Fitbit’s Charge 6 and Ace LTE are now as cheap as the new $100 Air
summary: Fitbit's Charge 6 and Ace LTE fitness trackers have been discounted to around $100, matching the price of the new Fitbit Air entry-level wearable. Each device targets different users, with the Charge 6 offering smartwatch features like GPS and payment support, while the Air focuses on basic health tracking.
content:
Fitbit’s Charge 6 offers more features than the Air and is currently the same price. | Photo by Amelia Holowaty Krales / The Verge	

Whether you’re shopping for Father’s Day or trying to keep your kids entertained over summer break, you don’t need to spend a fortune to get a great Fitbit right now. You can currently pick up the Fitbit Charge 6 for $50 off at Amazon, Best Buy, and Target, the Fitbit Ace LTE for $80 off (Amazon, Best Buy, Target), and the new Fitbit Air (Amazon, Best Buy, Target), and all come in around $100.
Fitbit Air

Where to Buy:

 $99.99 at Amazon 
 $99.99 at Best Buy 
 $99.99 at Target

While all three cost about the same, they’re designed for very different users. The Fitbit Air is geared toward anybody who wants a simple wearable focused mainly on health and fitness tracking, without the distractions of a screen or smartwatch features. It’s lightweight with no buttons, and tracks activity, steps, sleep, as well as core health metrics like heart rate and nightly blood oxygen levels. It also supports Bluetooth connectivity with certain gym equipment, allowing you to broadcast your heart rate to compatible machines during workouts. If you pay for a $9.99 monthly (or $99.99 annual) subscription, you’ll also gain access to Google’s surprisingly useful AI-powered Health Coach, which can create personalized fitness plans and offer recommendations based on your activity, sleep, and overall health data.
Fitbit Charge 6

Where to Buy:

 $159.95 $99.95 at Amazon
 $159.95 $99.95 at Best Buy
 $159.95 $99.95 at Target

The Charge 6, in contrast, looks more like a traditional Fitbit fitness tracker and offers a few extra perks. In addition to a bright OLED touchscreen, it boasts an FDA-cleared EKG reader and notably offers smartwatch-like functionality such as built-in GPS, turn-by-turn navigation via Google Maps, support for Google Wallet, and the ability to display call, text, and app notifications. As a result, it’s a better fit for people who want a wea

zh.title: Fitbit Charge 6 和 Ace LTE 现已降至新款 $100 Air 的相同价格
zh.summary: Fitbit 的 Charge 6 和 Ace LTE 健身追踪器已降价至约 $100，与新推出的 Fitbit Air 入门级可穿戴设备的价格相匹配。每款设备针对不同用户，Charge 6 提供 GPS 和支付功能等智能手表功能，而 Air 则专注于基本的健康跟踪。

title: Apple wants Europe to blink
summary: Apple announced that its new AI-powered Siri will not launch in the European Union, citing compliance concerns with the Digital Markets Act's data access requirements. The company is blaming EU regulation for withholding the feature from millions of iPhone and iPad users in Europe.
content:
It took a few years, but Apple finally made its AI look useful. Now millions of iPhone users in Europe are being told they won't be getting Siri AI anytime soon, if ever - and Apple wants them to blame the EU.
Apple says its new AI-powered Siri will not launch on iPhones and iPads in the European Union because of the Digital Markets Act, the bloc's competition law designed to stop powerful tech companies from acting as gatekeepers over their platforms to shut out rivals. In practice, the DMA requires platforms to give competitors the same kinds of data access as they themselves enjoy, with a few exceptions for things like ensuring their sys …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果希望欧洲让步
zh.summary: 苹果宣布其新型AI驱动的Siri将不会在欧盟推出，理由是担忧与《数字市场法案》的数据访问要求的合规问题。该公司将该功能无法为欧洲数百万iPhone和iPad用户提供的责任归咎于欧盟监管。

title: Screwworms in US: Human risk is low—but they can burrow through your skull
summary: While the risk to humans from screwworms in the US remains low, these parasites pose a documented health threat capable of burrowing through human tissue.
content: The chances are low, but not zero.

zh.title: 美国的蛆虫：人类风险低——但它们能钻穿你的头骨
zh.summary: 虽然美国的蛆虫对人类的风险仍然较低，但这些寄生虫构成了已知的健康威胁，能够钻穿人体组织。

title: Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 is a version of Mythos the public can access today
summary: Anthropic has released Claude Fable 5, marking the first public availability of its powerful Mythos-class AI model. The model includes safety guardrails that restrict outputs in high-risk domains like cybersecurity and biology, addressing prior concerns about the class's capabilities.
content: Anthropic is releasing Claude Fable 5, its first Mythos-class model available to the public. The model comes with guardrails that block responses in high-risk areas like cybersecurity and biology.

zh.title: Anthropic的Claude Fable 5是公众今天可访问的Mythos版本
zh.summary: Anthropic发布了Claude Fable 5，标志着其功能强大的Mythos级AI模型首次向公众推出。该模型包含安全防护措施，限制在网络安全和生物学等高风险领域的输出，解决了人们之前对该级别功能的担忧。

title: Anthropic releases its first Mythos-class model Claude Fable
summary: Anthropic announced Claude Fable 5 as its most capable publicly available model, excelling in software engineering, knowledge work, and vision tasks with performance gains on complex workloads. The release represents the first public availability of Anthropic's Mythos-class models, enabled by new safety safeguards blocking high-risk outputs.
content:
Anthropic just announced Claude Fable 5, a new AI model it said is the most powerful model it has ever made widely available. 
According to the company, Fable 5 "shows exceptional performance in software engineering, knowledge work, and vision," with its lead over other models growing as tasks become longer and more complex.
Fable 5 marks the first broad release from Anthropic's Mythos class of AI models, after the company said the family was so capable at cybersecurity tasks that it was too dangerous to release publicly. Anthropic said the release was "made possible by new safeguards that block responses in specific high-risk areas," with …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Anthropic发布其首个Mythos级模型Claude Fable
zh.summary: Anthropic宣布Claude Fable 5是其功能最强大的公开可用模型，在软件工程、知识工作和视觉任务上表现出色，在复杂工作负载上性能获得提升。该发布代表了Anthropic的Mythos级模型首次向公众推出，由新的安全防护措施实现，该措施可阻止高风险输出。

title: Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 is a version of Mythos the public can access today
summary: Anthropic is releasing Claude Fable 5, its first publicly available Mythos-class model, with built-in guardrails that restrict responses to high-risk domains like cybersecurity and biology.
content: Anthropic is releasing Claude Fable 5, its first Mythos-class model available to the public. The model comes with guardrails that block responses in high-risk areas like cybersecurity and biology.

zh.title: Anthropic 的 Claude Fable 5 是公众今天可以访问的 Mythos 版本
zh.summary: Anthropic 正在发布 Claude Fable 5，这是其第一个公开可用的 Mythos 级模型，配有内置防护栏，限制对网络安全和生物学等高风险领域的回应。

title: SwitchBot’s E Ink Weather Station is already 20 percent off
summary: SwitchBot's new 7.5-inch E Ink Weather Station smart display is available at a 20 percent discount just days after launch, priced around $85 through online retailers. The device combines weather forecasting, calendar integration, and smart home control with an AI assistant providing weather-based insights.
content:
We’re only a few days since the SwitchBot Smart E Ink Weather Station launched, and you can already save $25 on the smart home gadget. Visit Amazon and clip the on-page coupon to bring the price down to $85 at checkout, or use coupon code APAP23 on the SwitchBot site. The 7.5-inch framed panel shows information like current date and time, sunrise and sunset, and current weather, as well as the forecast for up to six days — all on a contrasty E Ink screen. 
SwitchBot Weather Station

Where to Buy:

 $109.99 $84.99 at Amazon
 $109.99 $84.69 at SwitchBot

The Weather Station has a built-in AI assistant that provides practical insights and inspirational quotes based on the weather. However, the display is good for more than just showing weather-based information. It can sync up with iCal, Google, and Outlook to display calendar information for up to five people. It also integrates with the SwitchBot Hub to control compatible smart devices using the configurable buttons embedded in the frame.

zh.title: SwitchBot 电子墨水天气站已降价 20%
zh.summary: SwitchBot 新推出的 7.5 英寸电子墨水天气站智能显示屏在推出仅数天后就打折 20%，通过在线零售商的价格约为 85 美元。该设备集天气预报、日历集成和智能家居控制于一身，配备 AI 助手提供基于天气的见解。

title: Rivian starts deliveries of its all-important R2 SUV
summary: Rivian has begun customer deliveries of its R2 electric SUV, which leadership considers a critical milestone for the company's growth. The R2 represents a significant product expansion aimed at the mass-market EV segment.
content: Founder and CEO RJ Scaringe has called it "maybe the most important thing we've launched to date."

zh.title: Rivian 开始交付其至关重要的 R2 SUV
zh.summary: Rivian 已开始交付其 R2 电动 SUV，领导层将其视为公司增长的关键里程碑。R2 代表了针对大众市场电动汽车领域的重要产品扩展。

title: One day after discovery, Meta pulls facial recognition code from its smart glasses
summary: Meta has removed facial recognition code from its smart glasses product just one day after the discovery became public. The company declined to explain the removal or clarify whether the feature will return in the future.
content: Meta won't say why or whether it's coming back.

zh.title: 发现一天后，Meta 从其智能眼镜中移除面部识别代码
zh.summary: Meta 在面部识别代码被公开发现仅一天后，就从其智能眼镜产品中移除了该代码。该公司拒绝解释移除原因或澄清该功能是否会在未来恢复。

title: Apple’s foldable iPhone could be just around the corner
summary: Code references in the iOS 27 developer beta suggest Apple is actively developing a foldable iPhone, with software references to fold states and screen angles. The discovery indicates the hardware could be nearing launch readiness.
content: The iOS 27 developer beta includes code that references the fold state and screen angle of a device.

zh.title: 苹果可折叠iPhone即将推出
zh.summary: iOS 27开发者测试版中的代码引用表明苹果正在积极开发可折叠iPhone，其中包含对折叠状态和屏幕角度的软件引用。这一发现表明该硬件可能即将做好推出准备。

title: Apple is embracing the fantasy of AI photo editing
summary: Apple announced new AI-powered photo editing tools at WWDC 2026 that enable extensive image manipulation while the company still labels the results as photographs. The move represents a significant shift from Apple's previous caution about generative AI's potential to distort reality perceptions.
content:
Apple’s feature showcase at WWDC 2026 didn’t flag which if these “photographs” are real or created with its new AI fakery. | Images by Apple / compiled by The Verge	

Apple used to question whether generative AI-powered editing features were worth the risk of distorting our perceptions of the world. Now it seems Apple no longer believes that photos should accurately capture reality. At WWDC 2026, the company announced a host of new AI-powered photo editing tools. They give users effortless powers of manipulating images that Apple still refers to as "photos." 
Two years ago, Apple launched Clean Up - an AI-powered object removal tool in Apple's Photo app that's similar to the Magic Eraser feature in Google Photos. At the time, Apple software chief Craig Federighi said that it was important for the company …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果正在拥抱AI照片编辑的幻想
zh.summary: 苹果在WWDC 2026上宣布了新的AI驱动照片编辑工具，这些工具能够进行广泛的图像处理，同时该公司仍将结果标记为照片。这一举动代表了苹果对生成AI可能扭曲现实认知潜力态度的重大转变。

title: It’s not FAANG anymore. It’s MANGOS.
summary: As SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI pursue public listings, the tech industry may be shifting toward a new acronym—MANGOS—replacing the long-established FAANG. The change reflects the emergence of a new generation of tech corporate titans from AI, aerospace, and related sectors.
content: With SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI all eyeing massive public debuts, the tech industry may soon have a new class of corporate overlords — and a new acronym to match. Say goodbye to FAANG and hello to MANGOS.

zh.title: 不再是FAANG了。现在是MANGOS。
zh.summary: 随着SpaceX、Anthropic和OpenAI寻求上市，科技行业可能正在转向一个新的首字母缩略词——MANGOS，取代历史悠久的FAANG。这一变化反映了来自AI、航空航天和相关领域的新一代科技巨头的出现。

title: Drone boat picked up downed US Army helicopter pilots—a first for sea rescues
summary: The US Navy's Task Force 59 successfully conducted the first-ever sea rescue using a drone boat, retrieving downed US Army helicopter pilots near the Strait of Hormuz. The achievement demonstrates the expanding capabilities of autonomous systems in military operations.
content: US Navy’s Task Force 59 achieved the drone rescue at sea near Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 无人艇成功救出坠落美国陆军直升机飞行员——海上救援的首次成功
zh.summary: 美国海军第59特遣部队成功进行了首次使用无人艇进行的海上救援，在霍尔木兹海峡附近救出坠落的美国陆军直升机飞行员。这一成就展示了自主系统在军事行动中不断扩展的能力。

title: Apple says it may remove some apps from the App Store if they don’t attract users
summary: Apple announced plans to potentially remove existing apps from the App Store if they fail to attract users or are deemed stale or low-value. The policy could impact thousands of legacy applications currently available on the platform.
content: Apple may begin removing existing apps that it considers stale, low-value, or unable to attract users.

zh.title: 苹果表示如果应用无法吸引用户，可能会从应用商店中删除
zh.summary: 苹果宣布计划可能会从应用商店中移除现有应用，如果这些应用未能吸引用户或被认为是过时或低价值的应用。该政策可能会影响该平台上目前可用的数千个遗留应用。

title: High-severity vulnerability in Linux caused by a single errant character
summary: A critical Linux vulnerability caused by a single incorrect character creates a use-after-free bug that can be exploited to bypass sandbox security protections. The flaw demonstrates how minimal code changes can introduce serious security risks in core system software.
content: Use-after-free bug can be exploited to evade sandbox defenses.

zh.title: Linux中由一个错误字符导致的高严重性漏洞
zh.summary: 一个由单个不正确字符引起的关键Linux漏洞导致了释放后使用错误，可被利用绕过沙箱安全保护。这个漏洞表明最小的代码更改如何能在核心系统软件中引入严重的安全风险。

title: iOS 27 features we didn’t see onstage
summary: iOS 27 brings numerous small refinements and hidden features beyond its on-stage presentation that could enhance everyday iPhone user experience despite the lack of major overhauls.
content: While iOS 27 isn't bringing major changes, it's still got many small features that could improve everyday usage for iPhone users.

zh.title: 我们在舞台上没有看到的 iOS 27 功能
zh.summary: iOS 27 除了舞台演示外，还带来了许多小改进和隐藏功能，尽管缺乏重大更新，但可以增强日常 iPhone 用户体验。

title: Apple brings streaming-style subscription bundles to the App Store
summary: Apple is expanding its App Bundles feature to enable developers to partner on discounted subscription packages, creating a streaming-style model for App Store offerings.
content: Apple is expanding its App Bundles feature to allow developers to partner with one another on discounted subscription packages.

zh.title: Apple 为 App Store 推出流媒体风格的订阅套餐
zh.summary: Apple 正在扩展其 App Bundles 功能，让开发者能够合作提供折扣订阅套餐，为 App Store 产品打造流媒体风格的模式。

title: Apple’s App Store rolls out personalized recommendations
summary: The App Store now delivers personalized app recommendations based on user download history and behavior, improving app discovery for individual users.
content: Apple will now recommend apps based on your downloads and behavior.

zh.title: Apple App Store 推出个性化推荐功能
zh.summary: App Store 现在根据用户下载历史和行为提供个性化应用推荐，改善了用户的应用发现体验。

title: Gold isn’t inert, it just has bodyguards protecting it
summary: Gold atoms are not chemically inert but instead form special protective oxidation-proof structures that act like bodyguards, revealing new insights into gold's chemical behavior.
content: Individual gold atoms move around to form oxidation-proof structures.

zh.title: 黄金并非惰性，它只是有"保镖"保护它
zh.summary: 金原子在化学上并非惰性的，而是形成特殊的防氧化保护结构，就像"保镖"一样，揭示了黄金化学行为的新见解。

title: Here's Audi's next Q7 SUV and US-only SQ7, now with an RS V8
summary: Audi unveiled its next-generation Q7 and SQ7 SUVs with an RS V8 engine and innovative projection headlights that display turn signals on the road for improved safety communication.
content: At night, the car projects its turn signals onto the road to alert other road users.

zh.title: 奥迪下一代 Q7 SUV 和美国限定 SQ7 配备 RS V8 发动机
zh.summary: 奥迪推出了下一代 Q7 和 SQ7 SUV，配备 RS V8 发动机和创新的投影大灯，可在路面上显示转向信号以提高安全通信效果。

title: Apple says its AI is still private, even when it's running on Google's servers
summary: Apple maintains that its AI models running on Google's cloud servers remain private, with Google unable to access data or operations. The approach allows Apple to scale AI services while preserving user privacy commitments.
content: Some models run in Google's cloud, but without giving Google any kind of access.

zh.title: 苹果表示其AI仍然是私密的，即使在谷歌服务器上运行
zh.summary: 苹果坚持认为其在谷歌云服务器上运行的AI模型仍然是私密的，谷歌无法访问数据或操作。这种方法允许苹果扩展AI服务，同时保持用户隐私承诺。

title: Apple dials down Liquid Glass, and the Mac looks way better for it
summary: Apple's macOS 27 Golden Gate introduces Liquid Glass, a slider that lets users control UI transparency levels for enhanced visual customization. This refinement focuses on appearance improvements while AI-powered Siri features roll out via waitlist.
content:
MacOS 27 Golden Gate will usher in a bunch of changes to the Mac when it's released later this year, with its biggest new features revolving around Siri AI. But for now, using the first developer beta, Siri AI is only offered through a waitlist. So what's available to try is mostly about how the upcoming operating system looks and feels. 
You're not welcomed with any fanfare when you boot up the macOS 27 developer beta (that'll probably come later), but there's reason to celebrate. Jump to the appearance settings, and you find that Apple now has a Liquid Glass slider, allowing users to set the amount of UI transparency in macOS. On one end  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果调低液态玻璃效果，Mac看起来更好看了
zh.summary: 苹果的macOS 27 Golden Gate推出了液态玻璃功能，用户可以通过滑块控制UI透明度级别以实现视觉自定义。该改进主要聚焦于外观优化，同时AI驱动的Siri功能通过候补名单陆续推出。

title: First Drive: The 2027 Rivian R2 entirely changes the EV game
summary: Rivian's upcoming R2 electric vehicle, priced under $60,000, represents a major shift in the EV market with strong performance and affordability. The long-awaited second model expands accessible EV options from the startup.
content: Rivian's second EV is the sub-$60,000 R2, and it was worth the wait.

zh.title: 首次试驾：2027年凯文R2彻底改变电动汽车市场
zh.summary: 凯文即将推出的R2电动汽车价格不到6万美元，代表电动汽车市场的重大转变，具有强劲的性能和实惠的价格。这款期待已久的第二款车型为初创公司扩展了可获得的电动汽车选择。

title: Lovable says it has hit $500M in annualized revenue, with 1 million new projects a week
summary: Lovable has reached $500 million in annualized run-rate revenue with one million new projects created weekly, demonstrating strong adoption of AI-powered development tools for building businesses and replacing internal software.
content: Lovable says it has now surpassed $500 million in annualized run-rate revenue and its users are building businesses and replacing internal software.

zh.title: Lovable宣布年化收入达5亿美元，每周新增百万个项目
zh.summary: Lovable已实现年化运行率收入5亿美元，每周创建一百万个新项目，彰显了AI驱动开发工具在构建业务和替代内部软件方面的强劲采用。

title: The Rivian R2 is too much fun to let drive itself
summary: Rivian's 2027 R2 targets mainstream success with a scaled-down, affordable design that maintains adventure-focused capabilities and human-driving appeal alongside the company's autonomous ambitions. Testing proved the vehicle's performance both on-road and off-road.
content:
Rivian may be all in on robotaxis and autonomy, but it's still got human drivers - and EV buyers - to win over. The pricey R1S SUV and R1T pickup brought Rivian A-list media attention and cult-hit status, but the company faces a critical next step. The 2027 R2 is Rivian's bid for mainstream success, scaled-down but not dumbed down. 
We drove a R2 Performance model from the streets of Park City, Utah, into Wasatch Mountains' twisties and then off-road trails, an idealized triathlon for the do-it-all driving that Rivian intends for its adventure-minded customers. In its newly attainable price range, the R2 proclaimed itself as a class of one: …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Rivian R2太有趣了，舍不得让它自动驾驶
zh.summary: Rivian的2027 R2车型采用更实惠的缩小设计来获得主流市场成功，同时保留冒险功能和人工驾驶的魅力，与公司的自主驾驶抱负相辅相成。测试证实了该车在公路和越野驾驶中的卓越性能。

title: Apple’s AI pitch will live or die by its privacy promise
summary: Apple's WWDC 2026 keynote emphasized AI privacy as its competitive differentiator, introducing Apple Intelligence across its ecosystem despite expanding cloud processing to Google's servers. The company's success depends on substantiating its privacy-first messaging.
content:
Apple says its cloud processing is as private as on-device, despite expanding to run on Google’s servers. | Screenshot: Apple WWDC 2026 keynote	

As expected, yesterday's WWDC keynote was mostly about AI. And also as expected, Apple tried to turn its late arrival into its sales pitch: it didn't rush into AI because it was taking its time to do things right. In this case, "right" means "with more privacy than anyone else." It's a good pitch - the question will be how well it holds up. 
The new Apple Intelligence features and the updated Siri AI have been designed to work across iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch, and Vision Pro. There's a dedicated Siri AI app, with a ChatGPT-esque chatbot experience, new AI-powered camera and photo editing features, and the beginnings of an agentic exper …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果人工智能的成败取决于隐私承诺
zh.summary: 苹果2026 WWDC主题演讲强调AI隐私保护是其竞争差异化因素,在整个生态系统中推出Apple Intelligence,尽管云处理扩展到了谷歌服务器。该公司的成功取决于其能否践行隐私优先的承诺。

title: How an e-scooter founder raised $5 million to build space data centers
summary: Orbital founder Euwyn Poon, who built 250,000 scooters at Spin, has raised $5 million to develop 10,000 data centers in space. The venture marks a significant pivot toward space-based infrastructure solutions.
content: Orbital founder Euwyn Poon built 250,000 scooters at Spin. Now he wants to launch 10,000 space data centers.

zh.title: 电动滑板车创始人如何融资500万美元开发太空数据中心
zh.summary: 曾在Spin公司打造25万辆电动滑板车的Orbital创始人欧文·庞融资500万美元,用于在太空建设1万个数据中心。这笔融资标志着该公司向太空基础设施解决方案的重大转型。

title: Marshall’s Stockwell speaker gets a replaceable battery that runs twice as long
summary: Marshall's Stockwell III speaker doubles battery life to over 40 hours with a user-replaceable battery, emphasizing repairability while preserving the iconic design. The speaker launches August 4th for $249.99.
content:
The Stockwell III is Marshall’s next product with a replaceable battery. | ﻿Image: Marshall	

Marshall has announced a new version of its stylish Stockwell Bluetooth speaker, putting a new focus on repairability. The Stockwell III, the brand's first update to this model since early 2019, features a similar design to its predecessor with a large carrying handle and speakers that pump sound in all directions, not just out the front like the iconic Marshall amps that inspired it. It will be available for purchase starting on August 4th through the company's online store and Costco for $249.99.
Battery life has been doubled from 20 hours to over 40 for the Stockwell III, but the speaker's overall potential life has been prolonged even f …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 马歇尔Stockwell扬声器搭载可更换电池,续航翻倍
zh.summary: 马歇尔Stockwell III扬声器采用用户可更换电池,将续航时间延长至40小时以上,在强调可维修性的同时保留了标志性设计。该扬声器将于8月4日发布,售价249.99美元。

title: Hue’s SpatialAware finally made me appreciate color-changing lights
summary: Philips Hue's Bridge Pro and new SpatialAware feature provide compelling reasons for existing users to upgrade, adding spatial awareness capabilities that enhance smart lighting control beyond traditional motion sensors.
content:
Adding the new Bridge Pro breathed new life into my Hue setup. | Photo: Jennifer Pattison Tuohy / The Verge	

I've been a fan of Philips Hue smart lights since the early days. It's one of the few staples in my ever-changing smart home. However, when the Bridge Pro launched late last year, it wasn't immediately obvious why I should upgrade. The signature feature, MotionAware - which turns your lights into motion sensors - is neat, but I already have motion sensors. While I run two of Hue's standard bridges to accommodate all my lights and accessories, I'm not at a point where I need the Pro's higher device capacity. I like the idea of faster response times thanks to the advanced processing power, but that wasn't quite enough.
Then in April, SpatialA …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Hue的SpatialAware功能让我终于欣赏上了彩色变光灯
zh.summary: 飞利浦Hue的Bridge Pro和新推出的SpatialAware功能为现有用户提供了具有说服力的升级理由，增加了空间感知功能，使智能照明控制超越了传统的动作传感器。

title: Amazon employees ask Seattle to put the brakes on new data centers
summary: Seattle's City Council votes June 9th on a one-year data center moratorium, backed by Amazon employees concerned about water consumption, electricity costs, and noise from proposed large-scale facilities. The move reflects growing environmental tensions with tech infrastructure expansion.
content:
On Tuesday, the Seattle City Council will vote on whether to enact a one-year moratorium on new data centers - just two months after several companies proposed building five large-scale centers in the city. Among the moratorium's fiercest supporters are current employees from the city's biggest tech giant, Amazon, who joined others to testify in support of the policy last week.
Data centers have sparked protests across the country over concerns about water consumption, local electricity prices, and noise. In Seattle and the surrounding King County, the issue is coming to a head. If the city council votes in favor of a moratorium on June 9th …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 亚马逊员工呼吁西雅图暂停新数据中心建设
zh.summary: 西雅图市议会将于6月9日投票表决一项为期一年的数据中心禁令，该禁令得到了关注水资源消耗、电力成本和拟建大型设施噪声问题的亚马逊员工的支持。此举反映了科技基础设施扩张引发的日益加剧的环境问题。

title: Evotrex raises $30M to build the RV that doesn’t need a charging station
summary: Evotrex raised $30 million to develop an RV with hybrid power technology enabling extended travel without traditional charging stations or campsites. The approach differentiates the startup in the growing recreational vehicle market.
content: The startup is one of many entering the RV space, but it's banking on a hybrid power system that can go far beyond campsites.

zh.title: Evotrex融资3000万美元开发无需充电站的混合动力房车
zh.summary: Evotrex融资3000万美元开发一款混合动力房车，该房车采用混合动力技术，使车主无需传统充电站或露营地即可进行长途旅行。这种方案使该初创公司在快速增长的房车市场中脱颖而出。

title: Donut Lab’s solid-state battery claim debunked by Ziroth
summary: YouTube channel Ziroth exposed Donut Lab's solid-state battery claims as fraudulent, with whistleblower assistance revealing the company uses standard lithium-ion technology despite claiming mass-production readiness. Analysis involved over 20 independent battery experts.
content:
The devil’s in the details. | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Donut Labs	

Donut Lab's solid-state battery claims have been thoroughly debunked by Ryan Inis Hughes on his popular Ziroth YouTube channel. According to Hughes, Donut Lab has engaged in deliberate, calculated deception by claiming to have a solid-state battery ready for mass production. In reality, it's nothing more than a standard lithium-ion design. 
Hughes' investigation got an assist from whistleblower Lauri Peltola, the former chief commercial officer (CCO) of Nordic Nano Group - the company supposedly partnered with Donut Lab to manufacture the batteries. Hughes says he also turned to "over 20 independent battery experts," including Julian Zahnow …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Donut Lab的固态电池声称被Ziroth揭露为虚假
zh.summary: YouTube频道Ziroth揭露Donut Lab的固态电池声称为欺诈，通过举报人协助发现该公司实际使用标准锂离子技术，尽管声称已准备好量产。分析涉及20多位独立电池专家。

title: Zepto’s IPO filing reveals fast growth, bigger losses, and a valuation question nobody’s answered yet
summary: Zepto's IPO filing shows strong growth momentum with advertising revenue surging 151%, though it grows faster than overall operating revenue of 104%, raising questions about sustainable profitability. The filing highlights the tension between rapid expansion and financial viability in India's competitive quick-commerce market.
content: Zepto's advertising revenue jumped 151%, outpacing the company's 104% growth in operating revenue.

zh.title: Zepto IPO申报文件显示快速增长、更大亏损，以及一个尚无人解答的估值问题
zh.summary: Zepto的IPO申报文件显示强劲的增长势头，广告收入激增151%，尽管其增速快于整体运营收入104%的增速，这引发了对可持续盈利能力的疑问。该申报文件突出了印度竞争激烈的快速商务市场中快速扩张与财务可行性之间的矛盾。

title: Why Apple’s slow-and-steady AI bet is starting to look pretty smart
summary: Apple's measured approach to AI development, initially criticized as slow, may prove strategic as the company introduces new AI capabilities through Apple Intelligence. The move positions Apple to compete in the AI race without the execution risks that plague competitors moving too quickly.
content: Can Apple's new AI glow up put to bed accusations that it's losing an all-important industry race?

zh.title: 为什么Apple缓慢而稳健的AI押注开始看起来相当明智
zh.summary: Apple对AI开发采取的谨慎态度最初因速度缓慢而遭到批评，但随着该公司通过Apple Intelligence推出新的AI功能，这种方法可能被证明是战略性的。这一举措使Apple能够在AI竞争中保持竞争力，而不必承担那些仓促行动的竞争对手所面临的执行风险。

title: FCC lifts looming deadline for Amazon Leo satellite broadband constellation
summary: The FCC granted Amazon a waiver to develop its Project Kuiper satellite broadband constellation, removing a previous deadline constraint. The decision supports competition in satellite internet by enabling a second major constellation alongside existing players.
content: The waiver "serves the public interest by promoting a second large satellite broadband constellation."

zh.title: FCC取消了Amazon Leo卫星宽带星座的迫在眉睫的期限
zh.summary: FCC批准了Amazon开发Project Kuiper卫星宽带星座的豁免，取消了之前的期限约束。该决定通过实现第二个主要星座与现有参与者并行发展，支持了卫星互联网的竞争。

title: Mercor’s Brendan Foody calls out Sequoia over ‘dual-pricing’ valuation tricks
summary: Mercor's CEO calls out Sequoia Capital for selling equity at two different prices, a practice shared by other top-tier venture firms. The criticism raises concerns about fairness and transparency in VC valuations.
content: Sequoia is just one of the top firms that sells same equity at two different prices.

zh.title: Mercor首席执行官布兰登·富迪指责红杉资本的"双重定价"估值伎俩
zh.summary: Mercor首席执行官指责红杉资本以两种不同价格出售股权，这一做法也被其他一流风险投资公司采用。这一批评引发了对风险投资估值公平性和透明度的关注。
